name: Buy Container Buildings
description:
Container buildings are factory-made steel structures clad to carry the look and strength of a shipping container, without being a recycled cargo box. SAMAN manufactures this one as a configured 20×15×8.6 ft unit — 300 square feet of usable floor — priced at ₹4,45,000 inclusive of all taxes, fabricated and checked at our Bangalore plant before it ships. You are not buying a "design concept" that needs weeks of quoting; you are buying one decided, commercial-grade structure that lands ready on your site.

What Is a Container Building Made Of?

A container building is built on a welded steel frame, clad outside with mild-steel (MS) sheet and lined inside with MD board. It takes the proportions of a shipping container but is not a cut-down ISO cargo box — it is purpose-built, so panel quality, insulation and finish are specified for occupied commercial use.

Inside the container building — MD-board lined and wired, ready for a commercial fit-out.

That distinction matters when you compare quotes. Many "container" sellers either repurpose worn shipping containers or stay vague about it. Our steel container buildings start as new fabrication: the MS exterior takes weather, dust and rough sites without rusting through quickly, and the MD-board lining gives you a clean internal surface ready for paint, fittings or partitions.

Inside the 20×15 ft Container Building — Spec and What's Included

The 20×15 ft container building on site — one configured commercial unit.

The unit is 20 feet long, 15 feet wide and 8.6 feet to the internal ceiling — 300 square feet of single open floor. The structure is a welded steel frame; the walls are MS sheet outside and MD board inside; the roof is finished and weather-sealed; the floor is laid; a door and windows are fitted for access and cross-ventilation. Inside, the electrical system is wired to a distribution switchboard, ready to connect to your supply.

The ₹4,45,000 price covers all of that and is inclusive of all taxes, with transport to most Indian sites included. Genuinely remote sites are quoted separately, but the unit itself is the price you see — one of the few container buildings in India sold at a fixed, published figure rather than "price on request."

Container Building or Steel-Panel Prefab — How to Choose

The container-form option — a navy MS-clad unit shown beside the comparison.

Both products buy you the same 300 sq ft at a similar price; the difference is the shell. This is the one decision worth making before you order.

Container building (this unit) Steel-panel prefab
Form & look Container profile, MS-clad Flat-panel building
Exterior Mild-steel sheet Insulated wood-based panel
Price ₹4,45,000 ₹4,25,000
Best for Rugged sites, container look, frequent relocation Lowest cost, lighter interior insulation

Choose this modular container building when you want the container look, a hard steel exterior for exposed sites, or a unit you expect to relocate. If neither the look nor the steel skin matters and you want the lighter, slightly cheaper option, a steel-panel prefab building is the better buy. Either way, larger or multi-room formats sit in our full prefab building range.

Where a Container Building Fits — Commercial Site Uses

A green container building in a working compound — one shell serving commercial use.

The 300 sq ft works as a clean wired office, a secure on-site store, a retail or sales unit, a site project office, or a staff room. The shell is fixed; the fit-out is yours — desks and partitions for an office, shelving for storage, a counter for retail.

It is a building shell, so it routes cleanly to the right SAMAN product when your need is more specific. If you actually want a single ready-made office in container form rather than a building shell to fit out, the container office cabin is configured for that. For a café or food outlet, see our container cafe range. And if you are buying a home rather than a commercial structure, our container houses range is built for residential use — not this page.

Site Base, Delivery and Relocating a Container Building

Placing the container building on a level base — no foundation, fully relocatable.

There is no foundation to dig. The unit stands on a level, compacted base — the same ground you would prepare for a slab, but with nothing poured. Level it, place the unit, bolt it down, connect power, and it is usable. Manufacturing begins on order confirmation and the unit ships within 10–14 days. Because the structure is a bolted steel frame in container form, it can be lifted and relocated to another site later — an advantage a poured RCC structure cannot offer.

Is a container building the same as a container house?

No. This is a commercial container-style building — an MS-clad steel shell for office, retail, storage or site use. A container house is a residential build with home fittings; if that is what you need, see our container houses range instead.

Container building or steel-panel prefab — which should I choose?

Pick the container building for the container look, a tougher steel exterior, and easy relocation. Pick the steel-panel option if you want the lowest price and lighter-weight insulated walls. Both give you 300 sq ft at a near-identical cost.

Can I use a container building as an office?

Yes — fit it out with partitions, desks and AC as a site or commercial office. If you would rather buy a single, ready-to-use office in container form than fit out a shell yourself, the container office cabin is built specifically for that.

Order This Container Building

Bangalore — Call +91 80886 85440 · WhatsApp +91 88616 22859
Delhi NCR — Call +91 87960 39938 · WhatsApp +91 97089 89937
short_description:
Commercial container building — 20×15 ft, MS-clad steel
A factory-built MS-clad steel building in container form — 300 sq ft, wired with a switchboard, delivered ready to place on a level base.
Size / Capacity 20×15×8.6 ft · 300 sq ft
Frame / Panel Steel · MS + MD board
Price / Delivery ₹4,45,000 · 10–14 days
Floor / Relocation Level base · Relocatable
Inclusive of all taxes
₹4,45,000
